curation.synopsis: Guilliman, Lord Commander and Regent of Terra, has departed for the Indomitus Crusade, taking the Imperium's freshest legions with him. The throneworld he leaves behind is wounded — bled of armies, riddled with cults that bred during the long years of warp-storm, and ruled by High Lords who never wanted his return in the first place. Valerian of the Adeptus Custodes patrols a Palace whose security walls are thinner than they look. Tanau Aleya rebuilds the Silent Sisterhood's citadel on Luna under the gaze of a court that fears any blade outside its grip. Chancellor Tieron tries to keep the Council's factions from devouring one another while the Phalanx returns to anchor a tentative peace. But as reconquest pushes deeper into Terra's slum-cities, a new pattern emerges in the unrest — and it is not Chaos. Some who oppose the Regent's vision of a renewed Imperium are willing to bleed the planet to prevent its survival, and the prospect of a Terran civil war begins to take shape in the shadows of the Senatorum.
